news.title: New Alibaba AI framework skips loading every tool, cutting agent token use 99%
news.summary: Alibaba researchers developed SkillWeaver, a novel AI framework that optimizes agent tool routing through execution graphs and iterative feedback, reportedly cutting token usage by 99%.

news.title: 库克最后 1 次以 CEO 身份参与，苹果 7 月 30 日公布第 3 财季财报
news.summary: Apple announces its Q3 2026 earnings release date, marking Tim Cook's last financial report as CEO before John Ternus assumes the role in September.

news.title: IQM, Europe’s first public quantum company, admits the future of the tech is uncertain
news.summary: European full-stack quantum computing company IQM has gone public on the Nasdaq with a $1.9 billion valuation while acknowledging the uncertain future of the technology.

news.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
news.summary: Anthropic is in discussions with Samsung to develop custom AI chips, mirroring OpenAI's recent partnership with Broadcom to reduce reliance on standard GPU suppliers.

news.title: Can Cursor Remain a Platform for OpenAI and Anthropic’s Models Inside SpaceX?
news.summary: An analysis of whether Cursor can maintain its open, multi-model platform strategy following its acquisition by SpaceX, highlighting the shifting dynamics between AI developer tools and frontier labs.

news.title: Newly discovered PamStealer isn't your typical macOS malware
news.summary: Security researchers have identified PamStealer, a new macOS infostealer utilizing clever stealth tradecraft, underscoring the increasing sophistication of Mac-targeted malware.

news.title: iOS 27 helps apps detect when a user may be getting scammed in real time
news.summary: Apple is introducing a new framework in iOS 27 that enables apps to detect and prevent social engineering scams in real time across various communication channels.

news.title: Virginia bans sale of geolocation data
news.summary: Virginia has passed legislation banning the sale of geolocation data, sparking discussions on privacy, data broker regulations, and the practical implications of user consent.

news.title: Exapunks (2018)
news.summary: A Hacker News thread discussing the enduring appeal of the 2018 programming puzzle game Exapunks and its influence on developers' approaches to code optimization and system architecture.

news.title: Private space pilots are flying orbital missions for the US Space Force
news.summary: Private space companies True Anomaly and Rocket Lab are conducting orbital satellite fly-by missions for the U.S. Space Force, highlighting the growing privatization of military space operations.

news.title: A warning sign about AI’s real cost, courtesy of Google and Amazon
news.summary: The article highlights how the massive energy demands of AI are making it increasingly difficult for major tech companies like Google and Amazon to meet their net-zero carbon pledges.

news.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
news.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI application that allows users to generate and share interactive mini-games using natural language text prompts.

news.title: Tesla driver faces manslaughter charges over Texas crash that killed a woman inside her home
news.summary: A Texas man is facing manslaughter charges after his Tesla, which he claimed was operating on Full Self-Driving, crashed into a home and killed a woman.

news.title: Fable 5 just set a new AI freelance work performance record - but it can't replace humans yet
news.summary: An Anthropic AI model has set a new performance record for automating freelance tasks, showcasing significant progress in AI automation while highlighting that human workers are not yet fully replacea
